flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Athens Technical College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.1k → $3.4k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Athens Technical College rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 (61.8% → 73.0%).
